title: PPL Alternative GUI
description: Alternative GUI Style for Pixel Perfection Legacy.
body:
Try my new Texture pack **Pixel Perfection Fidelity**

This pack is meant to serve as an alternative to [NovaWostra](https://modrinth.com/user/NovaWostra)'s [**Pixel Perfection Legacy**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) GUI. This pack adds a midnight blue (grayish) GUI to PPL. The style is a more consistent and desaturated alternative, making it feel more at home in Pixel Perfection's medieval artstyle. Although it is recommended to use it with the main pack, it can also be used as a standalone GUI pack. Some features of the pack, including custom textures for each Shulker box color, require some dependencies, marked below. Some of the textures depicted in gallery are from my other pack [PPL Hodgepodge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-hodgepodge) Follow project for future updates. # FEATURES SUPPORTED: - Custom textures for each Shulker Box color (Requires OptiGUI) - Reimagined Effects Textures - [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) custom GUI theme (DEPRECATED) - Custom Panoramas in title screen for select versions # DEPENDENCIES - [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) (REQUIRED) - [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) (RECOMMENDED) - [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (OPTIONAL) # **MY OTHER PACKS** - [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [PPL Hodgepodge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-hodgepodge) - [PPL Compat Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-compatibility-pack) - [Pixel Perfection x THE TWILIGHT FOREST](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-the-twilight-forest) - [Pixel Perfection x AD ASTRA](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-ad-astra) - [Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelperfectionxfarmersdelight) - [Pixel Perfection x DEHYDRATION](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-dehydration) - [Pixel Perfection x CONTROLIFY](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-controlify) - [PPL Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-better-grass) - [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade)
